ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the resource type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., Labor, Material, Equipment) */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the resource (e.g., EA, hours, days) */,
  "incomplete" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the data for the resource is incomplete */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the resource was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the resource was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_types" (
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource type */,
  "resource_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the resource type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_resources" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the project */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the resource */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the resource required for the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the project resource was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the project resource was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the scenario */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the scenario was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the scenario was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_scenario_costs" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the resource */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the scenario */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the resource for the scenario */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the resource scenario cost was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the resource scenario cost was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id", "scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., project manager, estimator, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
